function.name: user_get_property
function.description: Retrieves a property value from a specific user profile.

username.description: The unique, human-readable identifier for the user.

property.description: The name of the property to retrieve.

function.name: user_list_properties
function.description: Lists all properties and their values for a specific user profile.

username.description: The unique, human-readable identifier for the user.

function.name: user_remove_property
function.description: Removes a specific property from a user profile.

username.description: The unique, human-readable identifier for the user.

property.description: The name of the property to be deleted.

function.name: user_set_property
function.description: Sets a property value for a specific user profile.

username.description: The unique, human-readable identifier for the user.

property.description: The name of the property to set (must be unique per user).

value.description: The value to assign to the property as a string.

function.name: user_update_property
function.description: Updates an existing property for a specific user profile. If the property does not exist for the given user, no changes are made.

username.description: The unique, human-readable identifier for the user.

property.description: The name of the existing property to update.

value.description: The new value to assign to the property.
